title: ehrharta drummondiana
intro: Ehrharta drummondiana, also known as Drummond's grass or Drummond's wire-grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ehrharta drummondiana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ehrharta drummondiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for various health purposes.
